mapper.select: SELECT /* @SQLID=FCT006#SQL001 */ A.BUTEN_CODE, A.ACCOUNT_NUMBER, A.CORPORATION_KBN, A.TC_COMP_RANK, A.UAI_QA_FUND_CHARACTER FROM MEDIATE_USER_ATTRIBUTE_INFO A WHERE A.BUTEN_CODE = #{fct006Sql001RequestModel.butenCode} AND A.ACCOUNT_NUMBER = TO_NUMBER(#{fct006Sql001RequestModel.accountNumber})

SELECT /* @SQLID=FCT006#SQL002 */ PRODUCT_RANK FROM M_PRODUCT_RANK A
WHERE BR_DOMESTIC_FGN_IND = '0' AND BR_BRAND_IND = '1 ' AND SUBSTR(BRAND_CD,2,4) = SUBSTR(#{fct006Sql002RequestModel.brandCode1},1,4) AND COMPANY_CD = '0' || SUBSTR(#{fct006Sql002RequestModel.brandCode1},1,4) AND SUBSTR(BRAND_CD,7,1) = SUBSTR(#{fct006Sql002RequestModel.brandCode1},5,1)
WHERE BR_DOMESTIC_FGN_IND ='0' AND BR_BRAND_IND = '3 ' AND SUBSTR(BRAND_CD,9,4) = #{fct006Sql002RequestModel.brandCode1} AND SUBSTR(BRAND_CD,4,2) = SUBSTR(#{fct006Sql002RequestModel.brandCode2}, 2, 2)
INNER JOIN STAR_FLARE_PRODUCT_RELATION B ON SUBSTR(A.BRAND_CD,1,5) = B.N_PRODUCT_CODE And B.PRODUCT_CLASSIFY = '89' AND B.F_COUNTRY_CODE = #{fct006Sql002RequestModel.countryCode} WHERE A.BR_DOMESTIC_FGN_IND = '1' And A.BR_BRAND_IND = '3 ' And TRIM(B.F_PRODUCT_CODE) = TRIM(#{fct006Sql002RequestModel.brandCode1})
where 1 = 0

SELECT /* @SQLID=FCT006#SQL002ForeignStock */ CASE
WHEN COUNT = 1 THEN '5' ELSE '4'
WHEN COUNT = 1 THEN '6' ELSE '5'
END PRODUCT_RANK FROM ( SELECT COUNT(*) as COUNT FROM M_CODE WHERE START_DATE <= IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_SDATE('YYYYMMDD') AND END_DATE >= IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_SDATE('YYYYMMDD') AND CODE_TYPE = '75' AND CODE_1 = #{fct006Sql002RequestModel.requestCountryCode} AND
CODE_2 = #{fct006Sql002RequestModel.productCode}
CODE_2 = TRIM(#{fct006Sql002RequestModel.brandCode1})
)

SELECT /* @SQLID=FCT006#SQL004 */ CHK_RESULT, MESSAGE_ID, CHK_BOX_LABEL FROM M_COMP_CHK_RESULT WHERE COMP_STS = #{fct006Sql004RequestModel.compSts} AND CHK_TYPE = #{fct006Sql004RequestModel.chkType} AND INVITATION_TYPE = #{fct006Sql004RequestModel.invitationType}

SELECT /* @SQLID=FCT006#SQL006 */ PRODUCT_CODE FROM ETJP_PRODUCT_MASTER WHERE STATUS = '0' AND COUNTRY_CODE = #{fct006Sql006RequestModel.countryCode} AND INVESTOR_PRODUCT_CODE = TRIM(#{fct006Sql006RequestModel.brandCode1})
